source_rationale: KRT7 is a cytokeratin marking simple epithelial cells, strongly expressed in this cluster
KRT19 is a luminal epithelial marker characteristic of ductal/secretory epithelial cells
KRT17 marks basal-like epithelial cells and is associated with progenitor epithelial phenotypes
EPCAM is a canonical epithelial cell adhesion molecule marking epithelial lineage
CDH1 (E-cadherin) is a hallmark of epithelial cell-cell adhesion
MMP7 is expressed by epithelial cells, particularly in airway and glandular epithelia
TP63 is a transcription factor marking basal epithelial cells
TACSTD2 (TROP2) is an epithelial surface marker enriched in progenitor-like epithelial cells
CD24 is expressed on epithelial progenitor cells and various carcinomas
GPRC5A is a retinoic acid-induced receptor enriched in lung epithelial cells
MHC class II gene highly expressed in antigen-presenting dendritic cells
CLEC9A is a specific marker for conventional dendritic cells type 1 (cDC1)
WDFY4 is required for cross-presentation and is a cDC1-specific gene
ZBTB46 is a transcription factor specifically expressed in classical dendritic cells
IRF8 is a key transcription factor driving cDC1 differentiation
IDO1 is an immunomodulatory enzyme expressed by activated dendritic cells
CADM1 is a cell adhesion molecule used as a surface marker for cDC1
S100B is expressed in cDC1 dendritic cells in human tissues
AREG (amphiregulin) is produced by activated dendritic cells, particularly cDC2
CD1C is a canonical marker for conventional dendritic cells type 2 (cDC2)
CLEC10A is a C-type lectin receptor specifically marking cDC2
FCER1A (high-affinity IgE receptor alpha) is expressed on cDC2 and basophils
MHC class II expression is high in antigen-presenting cDC2 cells
CD86 is a costimulatory molecule on dendritic cells important for T cell activation
GPR183 (EBI2) guides dendritic cell migration and is enriched in cDC2
CCL17 is a chemokine produced by cDC2 to attract Th2 cells
CCL5 (RANTES) is a chemokine highly expressed by cytotoxic CD8+ T cells
CD8A is the defining surface marker for CD8+ cytotoxic T lymphocytes
CD8B pairs with CD8A to form the CD8 co-receptor on cytotoxic T cells
NKG7 is a cytotoxic granule protein expressed by activated CD8+ T and NK cells
GZMB (granzyme B) is a serine protease mediating cytotoxic killing by CD8+ T cells
CD3D is a component of the TCR complex confirming T cell identity
GZMH is a granzyme expressed by effector CD8+ T cells
PRF1 (perforin) is essential for cytotoxic granule-mediated killing by CD8+ T cells
RUNX3 is a transcription factor critical for CD8+ T cell lineage commitment
CD1A is a hallmark marker of Langerhans cells
CD207 (langerin) is the defining marker of Langerhans cells
CD1E is expressed by Langerhans cells and involved in lipid antigen presentation
S100B is highly expressed in Langerhans cells within epithelial tissues
FCER1A is expressed on Langerhans cells for IgE-mediated antigen capture
LTB (lymphotoxin beta) is expressed by Langerhans cells in tissue microenvironments
ENTPD1 (CD39) is an ectonucleotidase expressed on Langerhans cells
MHC class II molecule highly expressed in Langerhans cells for antigen presentation
DCN (decorin) is a proteoglycan abundantly expressed by fibroblasts
CFD (complement factor D/adipsin) marks adipocyte-like or resting fibroblasts
FBLN1 (fibulin-1) is an ECM protein produced by fibroblasts
COL1A2 encodes type I collagen, a major fibroblast product
LUM (lumican) is a proteoglycan characteristic of fibroblasts
PI16 is a marker of universal fibroblast progenitors
SFRP2 is a Wnt pathway modulator enriched in fibroblast subsets
IGFBP6 is secreted by fibroblasts and marks quiescent fibroblast populations
SCGB3A1 is a secretoglobin marking club/secretory airway epithelial cells
SCGB1A1 (CC10/uteroglobin) is the canonical club cell marker in airways
BPIFB1 is an innate defense protein expressed by secretory airway epithelial cells
WFDC2 (HE4) is a secretory protein expressed by club and secretory epithelial cells
SLPI is an anti-protease secreted by airway secretory epithelial cells
PIGR mediates transcytosis of IgA in secretory epithelial cells
MUC5B is a gel-forming mucin produced by secretory airway cells
LTF (lactoferrin) is secreted by glandular/secretory epithelial cells
LCN2 (lipocalin-2) is an antimicrobial protein from secretory epithelial cells
GNLY (granulysin) is a cytotoxic molecule in NK and NKT cells
KLRD1 (CD94) is an NK cell receptor marking NK and NKT cells
KLRB1 (CD161) marks NKT cells and innate-like lymphocytes
KLRC1 (NKG2A) is an inhibitory NK receptor on NK and NKT cells
XCL1 is a chemokine produced by activated NK cells
XCL2 is an NK cell-derived chemokine
NCAM1 (CD56) is the canonical NK cell surface marker
NKG7 is a cytotoxic granule membrane protein in NK cells
FCER1G is an adaptor protein for activating NK cell receptors
KLRB1 (CD161) is a hallmark of ILC3 and innate-like T cells
IL7R (CD127) marks ILC progenitors and memory T cells
KIT (CD117) marks ILC2/ILC3 progenitors
AREG (amphiregulin) is produced by ILC2 cells for tissue repair
XCL1 is produced by innate lymphoid cells and NK cells
TNFSF11 (RANKL) is expressed by ILC3 and activated lymphocytes
ID2 is a transcription factor essential for ILC development
GATA3 is the master transcription factor for ILC2 cells
SSBP2 is enriched in ILC populations in tissue-resident innate lymphocytes
FOXI1 is the master transcription factor defining ionocytes/pulmonary ionocytes
ASCL3 is a transcription factor marking ionocytes in airway epithelium
CFTR chloride channel is highly expressed in ionocytes
ATP6V1B1 is a vacuolar ATPase subunit enriched in ionocytes for proton transport
CLCNKB is a chloride channel expressed in ionocytes
PDE1C is highly expressed in ionocytes among airway epithelial cells
TFCP2L1 is a transcription factor associated with ionocyte differentiation
HEPACAM2 is specifically expressed in pulmonary ionocytes
CCL21 is a chemokine produced by lymphatic endothelial cells
PROX1 is the master transcription factor for lymphatic endothelial identity
PDPN (podoplanin) is a canonical lymphatic endothelial cell marker
LYVE1 is a hyaluronan receptor specific to lymphatic endothelium
TFF3 is expressed by lymphatic endothelial cells in various tissues
TBX1 is a transcription factor involved in lymphatic vessel development
NRP2 is a VEGF co-receptor enriched in lymphatic endothelial cells
MMRN1 is an endothelial protein enriched in lymphatic vessels
FABP4 is expressed by lymphatic endothelial cells in tissue
APOC1 is highly expressed by tissue-resident alveolar macrophages
FABP4 is a canonical marker of alveolar macrophages
C1QA complement component is highly expressed by tissue macrophages
MSR1 (CD204) is a scavenger receptor on alveolar macrophages
MARCO is a scavenger receptor specific to alveolar macrophages
MRC1 (CD206) is a mannose receptor marking tissue-resident macrophages
PPARG is a transcription factor essential for alveolar macrophage identity
VSIG4 is a complement receptor expressed by tissue-resident macrophages
LGALS3 (galectin-3) is highly expressed by activated macrophages
SPP1 (osteopontin) marks SPP1+ macrophages associated with fibrosis and inflammation
CTSB (cathepsin B) is a lysosomal protease enriched in activated macrophages
MRC1 (CD206) marks tissue macrophages with phagocytic function
GPNMB is expressed by lipid-laden and activated macrophages
SLC16A10 is a monocarboxylate transporter enriched in this macrophage subset
APOE is expressed by lipid-handling macrophages
FTL (ferritin light chain) is highly expressed in iron-recycling macrophages
CCL18 is a chemokine produced by alternatively activated macrophages
TPSB2 (tryptase beta 2) is the defining marker of mast cells
TPSAB1 (tryptase alpha/beta 1) is a canonical mast cell protease
CPA3 (carboxypeptidase A3) is a mast cell-specific protease
KIT (CD117) is the stem cell factor receptor essential for mast cell survival
MS4A2 (FcεRIβ) is the beta chain of the high-affinity IgE receptor on mast cells
GATA2 is a transcription factor essential for mast cell development
HPGDS produces prostaglandin D2 in mast cells
HDC (histidine decarboxylase) synthesizes histamine in mast cells
IL1RL1 (ST2) is the IL-33 receptor expressed on mast cells
CCR7 is a chemokine receptor marking mature/migratory dendritic cells
LAMP3 (CD208) is a marker of mature dendritic cells
FSCN1 (fascin) is upregulated in mature/activated dendritic cells
CCL22 is a chemokine produced by mature dendritic cells to attract T cells
CCL19 is produced by mature DCs to guide lymphocyte migration
IDO1 is an immunoregulatory enzyme in mature dendritic cells
CD83 is a maturation marker for dendritic cells
BIRC3 is an anti-apoptotic gene upregulated in activated mature DCs
IL7R is expressed on mature migratory DCs (mregDC/LAMP3+ DCs)
MSLN (mesothelin) is a marker of mesothelial cells lining body cavities
CALB2 (calretinin) is a canonical mesothelial cell marker
UPK3B (uroplakin 3B) is expressed by mesothelial cells
HAS1 (hyaluronan synthase 1) is expressed by activated mesothelial cells
PRG4 (lubricin) is a glycoprotein produced by mesothelial cells
C3 complement is produced by mesothelial cells in serosal cavities
PDPN (podoplanin) is expressed on mesothelial cells
ITLN1 (intelectin-1) is a lectin produced by mesothelial cells
HP (haptoglobin) is produced by mesothelial cells in inflammatory conditions
LUM (lumican) is a proteoglycan highly expressed by fibroblasts
DCN (decorin) is a major ECM proteoglycan produced by fibroblasts
COL1A2 encodes type I collagen produced by activated/myofibroblasts
COL3A1 encodes type III collagen characteristic of fibroblasts
COL1A1 is the major collagen gene in matrix-producing fibroblasts
POSTN (periostin) marks activated/myofibroblastic fibroblasts
CDH11 (cadherin-11) is expressed by fibroblasts in connective tissue
SERPINE1 (PAI-1) is produced by activated fibroblasts
SCN7A marks a specific fibroblast subset in lung tissue
NKG7 is a cytotoxic granule protein in NK cells
GNLY (granulysin) is a cytotoxic effector molecule in NK cells
GZMB (granzyme B) mediates cytotoxic killing by NK cells
PRF1 (perforin) is essential for NK cell cytotoxicity
KLRD1 (CD94) is an NK cell receptor
KLRF1 (NKp80) is an activating receptor specific to NK cells
FGFBP2 is a marker of cytotoxic CD56dim NK cells
SPON2 is expressed by cytotoxic NK cells
FCGR3A (CD16) is the Fc receptor mediating ADCC on NK cells
S1PR5 is a sphingosine-1-phosphate receptor marking mature NK cells
FCN1 is a pattern recognition molecule marking classical monocytes
LILRA5 is an immunoglobulin-like receptor on classical monocytes
LILRB2 is an inhibitory receptor expressed on monocytes
NAMPT is highly expressed in activated classical monocytes
S100A4 is expressed by monocytes and inflammatory cells
WARS (tryptophanyl-tRNA synthetase) is induced in activated monocytes
LST1 is expressed by monocytes and macrophages
AIF1 (IBA1) is a monocyte/macrophage marker
MAFB is a transcription factor in monocyte differentiation
RGS5 is a canonical pericyte marker
PDGFRB is the defining receptor for pericytes
NOTCH3 is expressed by pericytes and vascular smooth muscle cells
COX4I2 is a mitochondrial gene enriched in pericytes
NDUFA4L2 is a hypoxia-responsive gene enriched in pericytes
MYL9 is a smooth muscle myosin light chain expressed in pericytes
HIGD1B is a mitochondrial protein enriched in pericytes
THY1 (CD90) is expressed on pericytes and fibroblasts
CDH6 (cadherin-6) marks pericyte subpopulations
JCHAIN (joining chain) is essential for IgA/IgM polymerization in plasma cells
IGHA1 encodes IgA1 heavy chain produced by IgA-secreting plasma cells
MZB1 is a plasma cell-specific ER chaperone for immunoglobulin assembly
XBP1 is a transcription factor essential for plasma cell differentiation

POU2AF1 (OBF-1) is a B cell/plasma cell transcriptional coactivator
CD79A is part of the B cell receptor complex retained in plasma cells

GRP (gastrin-releasing peptide) is the defining marker of pulmonary neuroendocrine cells

BATF is a transcription factor important for Treg function in tissues
FOXP1 cooperates with FOXP3 in Treg transcriptional programs

RTKN2 has been identified as a Treg-enriched gene in human tissues
MYH11 is a smooth muscle myosin heavy chain defining vascular smooth muscle cells
ACTA2 (alpha-smooth muscle actin) is a canonical smooth muscle cell marker

CAMK4 is involved in T cell activation signaling
ANK3 is enriched in naive/resting CD4+ T cells
VWF (von Willebrand factor) is a canonical endothelial cell marker

CLDN5 is a tight junction protein specific to vascular endothelium
ERG is a transcription factor essential for endothelial cell identity
PTPRB (VE-PTP) is a vascular endothelial phosphatase
DKK2 marks arterial endothelial cells
EFNB2 is an arterial endothelial marker distinguishing arteries from veins
BMX is a tyrosine kinase expressed in arterial endothelial cells
EPAS1 (HIF-2α) is a transcription factor enriched in endothelial cells
CLDN5 is a tight junction protein of vascular endothelium
PECAM1 (CD31) confirms endothelial identity
EMCN (endomucin) is a venous/capillary endothelial marker
CA4 (carbonic anhydrase 4) marks alveolar capillary endothelial cells
EDNRB (endothelin receptor B) is expressed on capillary endothelial cells
IL1RL1 (ST2) marks capillary endothelial cells in the lung
HPGD marks general capillary (gCap) endothelial cells in the lung
CDH5 (VE-cadherin) is an endothelial-specific adherens junction protein
BTNL9 marks capillary endothelial cells in the lung

FCN3 (Ficolin-3) is highly expressed in lung capillary endothelial cells and is a marker of pulmonary capillary endothelium
Von Willebrand Factor is a classic endothelial cell marker produced by vascular endothelium
PECAM1 (CD31) is a canonical endothelial cell adhesion molecule and widely used endothelial marker
Claudin-5 is a tight junction protein highly specific to endothelial cells
VE-cadherin (CDH5) is an endothelial-specific adherens junction protein
EPAS1 (HIF-2α) is highly expressed in pulmonary endothelial cells and regulates vascular function
ERG is an ETS transcription factor essential for endothelial cell identity and vascular development
RAMP2 is an endothelial receptor component for adrenomedullin signaling in pulmonary vasculature

IFI27 is an interferon-stimulated gene highly expressed in pulmonary capillary endothelial cells (aerocytes/gCap)

VWF confirms endothelial identity with high expression in venous endothelium
CCL14 is a chemokine preferentially expressed by venous endothelial cells
Periostin expression in endothelium suggests venous or peribronchial vascular identity

IGFBP7 is highly expressed in venous endothelial cells and pericytes in the lung

Highest logFC gene confirming endothelial identity in this cluster
ACKR1 marks venous endothelium; its presence with IL1R1 suggests activated venous endothelium
IL1R1 is upregulated in activated/inflamed endothelial cells, suggesting an inflammatory venous endothelial state

HDAC9 is associated with vascular endothelial function and arterial/venous specification
PTPRB (VE-PTP) is an endothelial-specific phosphatase regulating vascular permeability
